rationale: Review 2 catches all the same scope violations (True-field stubs, premature IsUnipotent) while additionally identifying concrete, diff-visible design flaws in the pieces that should be kept — AffineAlgGroup bundling smoothness (lines 36–39) and AlgPoints fixed at `A →ₐ[k] k` (line 45) — so following Review 2 leaves better-designed foundations, not just a smaller PR.
